summary: Phase 4 Governance Dashboards & Advanced Analytics testing complete. All 26 backend API tests passed. All frontend Governance tab features verified with 4 sub-views (Overview, Trends, SLA Compliance, Ownership) working correctly with Recharts charts. AWS Findings enhanced view in Remediation tab verified with separate Inspector/Security Hub sub-tabs.
critical_code_review_comments: GovernanceService properly calculates metrics with weighted risk score (crit*25 + high*15 + med*5 + low*1)
All 6 governance endpoints correctly return data without MongoDB _id
Trends endpoint respects days parameter (7-90 range) for customizable date ranges
SLA compliance calculates overdue CVEs based on severity-specific SLA hours from policies
MTTR calculation handles both string and datetime ISO formats for detected_at/fixed_at
Frontend GovernanceTab uses data-testid attributes for all 4 sub-view buttons (gov-view-overview/trends/sla/ownership)
Recharts components (PieChart, BarChart, AreaChart, LineChart) render correctly with responsive containers
AWS Findings enhanced view has separate Inspector/Security Hub sub-tabs with proper data-testid attributes
AWS connection status shows real-time connection state for both Inspector and Security Hub
seed_data_creation: Used existing CVEs from Phase 1-3 testing (7 total CVEs, 1 open high severity)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Governance Dashboards fully functional. GovernanceService initialized at startup. 6 governance endpoints working: /metrics, /trends, /sla, /ownership, /mttr, /scan-activity. Frontend Governance tab is 5th tab in CVE Management Platform with 4 sub-views using Recharts for visualization. AWS integration enhanced with separate Inspector/Security Hub sub-tabs in AWS Findings view.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real MongoDB and live AWS credentials. AWS Inspector connected (0 active findings), Security Hub connected (1 GuardDuty finding).

backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/metrics: PASS - Returns total_cves=7, open_cves=1, risk_score=15, fix_rate_30d=42.9%, severity_distribution, services_affected
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/metrics structur: PASS - All required fields present with correct types
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/metrics addition: PASS - new_last_30_days, fixed_last_30_days, remediation stats included
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/trends?days=30: PASS - Returns 31 trend entries with date, label, detected, fixed per day
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/trends structure: PASS - trends array and period_days present
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/sla: PASS - Returns overall_compliance=100%, 4 severity SLA entries
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/sla structure: PASS - Each severity has sla_hours, open, overdue, within_sla, compliance_pct
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/sla severity: PASS - Critical (24h), High (72h), Medium (168h), Low (720h) SLAs
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/ownership: PASS - Returns by_team, by_person, by_source, by_status arrays
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/ownership data: PASS - by_source shows yarn_audit:4, manual:1, automated_test:1, pip_audit:1
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/ownership struct: PASS - All arrays have correct item structure
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/mttr: PASS - Returns mttr object with critical/high/medium/low breakdowns
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/mttr structure: PASS - Each severity has avg_hours, avg_days, sample_size, min_hours, max_hours
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/mttr data: PASS - Medium has 2 samples with 0h avg (instant fixes from test data)
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/scan-activity: PASS - Returns total_scans=17, recent_scans array, by_scanner object
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/scan-activity sc: PASS - trivy:6, grype:4, checkov:4, syft:3 scans tracked
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/scan-activity st: PASS - Recent scans have id, scanner, scan_type
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/remediation/aws/findings co: PASS - AWS Inspector connected (no active findings)
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/remediation/aws/security-hu: PASS - Returns source=security_hub, count=1, 1 GuardDuty finding
PASS - Finding has id, title, severity, product fields
backend_tests.Full governance data load: PASS - All 5 endpoints return data for dashboard rendering
backend_tests.Governance data consistency: PASS - Status totals match total_cves count

frontend_tests.CVE Management Dashboard loads: PASS - Dashboard accessible at /cve-management after login
frontend_tests.Governance tab visible: PASS - 5th tab in main navigation with BarChart3 icon
frontend_tests.Governance tab clickable: PASS - Click navigates to Governance view
frontend_tests.Sub-view buttons (data-testid): PASS - gov-view-overview, gov-view-trends, gov-view-sla, gov-view-ownership all present
frontend_tests.Overview sub-view: PASS - Shows Risk Gauge (score 15), 6 stat cards, severity pie chart, status pie chart, services bar chart, source bar chart, MTTR chart
frontend_tests.Trends sub-view: PASS - 30-day AreaChart with Detected/Fixed lines, summary cards (New 7d: 7, New 30d: 7, Fixed 30d: 3, Fix Rate: 42.9%)
frontend_tests.SLA Compliance sub-view: PASS - Overall 100% shown (data-testid='sla-overall'), 4 severity cards with progress bars, SLA bar chart
frontend_tests.Ownership sub-view: PASS - CVEs by Team/Assignee bars, CVE Sources pie chart, Status Distribution bar chart
frontend_tests.Sub-view navigation: PASS - All 4 sub-views render correctly when clicked
frontend_tests.AWS Security Integration header: PASS - Shows Inspector: Connected | Security Hub: Connected
frontend_tests.Security Hub finding: PASS - Shows LOW severity GuardDuty finding about root credentials
